query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_performance_metrics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractor_id INT NOT NULL,
  quote_accuracy_score INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  average_variance INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  compliance_score INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  compliance_issues_count INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  average_response_time INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  response_rate INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  completion_rate INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  on_time_delivery_rate INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  average_rating INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  total_reviews INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  total_quotes_submitted INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  total_projects_completed INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  period_start TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  period_end TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_performance_metrics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractor_id INT NOT NULL,
  quote_accuracy_score INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  average_variance INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  compliance_score INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  compliance_issues_count INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  average_response_time INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  response_rate INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  completion_rate INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  on_time_delivery_rate INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  average_rating INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  total_reviews INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  total_quotes_submitted INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  total_projects_completed INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  period_start TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  period_end TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
